requirement_topic.en: CIE Grid Connection and Site Load Approval
requirement_topic.zh: CIE 电网接入与场站负荷批准
requirement_topic.zht: CIE 電網接入與場站負荷批准

summary.en: EV charger deployment in Cote d'Ivoire must be coordinated with the local electricity service route, including CIE service connection, available capacity, metering, protection, transformer sizing, power-quality impacts, and energisation conditions. High-power DC charging can require utility review even when the charger product has technical test reports.
summary.zh: 科特迪瓦电动汽车充电设备部署必须与当地供电服务路径协调，包括 CIE 供电接入、可用容量、计量、保护、变压器容量、电能质量影响和送电条件。即使充电设备已有技术测试报告，高功率直流充电仍可能需要公用事业审查。
summary.zht: 象牙海岸電動汽車充電設備部署必須與當地供電服務路徑協調，包括 CIE 供電接入、可用容量、計量、保護、變壓器容量、電能品質影響和送電條件。即使充電設備已有技術測試報告，高功率直流充電仍可能需要公用事業審查。

standards_or_laws: CIE service-connection and customer power-supply requirements
Cote d'Ivoire electricity-sector requirements for distribution connection

summary.en: China domestic project files may include State Grid or China Southern Power Grid connection drawings, commissioning records, GB/T 18487 test reports, and Chinese protection assumptions. These documents do not approve a CIE service connection or energisation in Cote d'Ivoire.
summary.zh: 中国国内项目文件可能包括国家电网或南方电网接入图纸、调试记录、GB/T 18487 测试报告和中国保护配置假设。这些文件不能批准科特迪瓦 CIE 供电接入或送电。
summary.zht: 中國國內項目文件可能包括國家電網或南方電網接入圖紙、調試記錄、GB/T 18487 測試報告和中國保護配置假設。這些文件不能批准象牙海岸 CIE 供電接入或送電。

gap.en: Prepare a site connection package for CIE or the relevant local electrical authority: charger load profile, maximum demand, harmonic and power-quality data, protective device schedule, earthing approach, transformer or panel capacity, metering, civil layout, and commissioning plan.
gap.zh: 应为 CIE 或相关当地电力主管方准备场站接入资料包：充电设备负荷曲线、最大需量、谐波和电能质量数据、保护装置表、接地方案、变压器或配电柜容量、计量、土建布置和调试计划。
gap.zht: 應為 CIE 或相關當地電力主管方準備場站接入資料包：充電設備負荷曲線、最大需量、諧波和電能品質資料、保護裝置表、接地方案、變壓器或配電櫃容量、計量、土建布置和調試計畫。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for site energisation where a new or upgraded CIE service connection, metering change, or distribution-capacity review is required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific for Chinese domestic grid connection; not transferable to CIE approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product test reports do not energise a charging site. Confirm CIE capacity, metering, protection, and commissioning requirements before shipping high-power chargers or committing to public charging uptime.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品测试报告不能替代充电场站送电。出货高功率充电设备或承诺公共充电可用率前，应确认 CIE 容量、计量、保护和调试要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品測試報告不能替代充電場站送電。出貨高功率充電設備或承諾公共充電可用率前，應確認 CIE 容量、計量、保護和調試要求。
